overall.description: Game footage depicting first-person exploration of a rustic cabin interior. The player discovers a deceased man slumped over a dining table near a burning fireplace, with scattered money visible on the table. The scene features detailed wooden architecture with dramatic morning sunlight streaming through windows, creating strong shadows across the wooden floorboards.

events.description: camera enters the cabin from outside through a wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the dimly lit cabin, moving from the doorway into the dining area

notable_agents.action: deceased male figure slumped motionless over the dining table in the distance

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame marking the entrance to the cabin
rectangular wooden table with chairs arranged around it
adjacent kitchen space with counters and cabinets visible in the background
window streaming bright morning sunlight into the kitchen area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player entering a rustic wooden cabin through a doorway. The camera moves forward into a dimly lit dining area, revealing a kitchen in the background illuminated by bright morning sunlight streaming through a window. A deceased figure is visible in the distance slumped over the dining table.

agents.ego_description: approaching the dining table to investigate the deceased figure and scattered items

notable_agents.action: deceased male lying face-down on the table with arm extended toward scattered money

entered.detail: stone fireplace with active fire burning inside
paper bills and cards scattered on the table near the body

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the room toward the dining table, approaching the deceased figure. A stone fireplace with an active fire becomes visible to the right. The camera focuses on the body and scattered money on the table, with the kitchen area now behind the player.

events.description: camera moves closer to fireplace, increasing warm firelight illumination

agents.ego_description: circling the table to survey the room, examining the fireplace and adjacent staircase

entered.detail: wooden stairs leading upward against the left wall
old upholstered sofa with visible wear against the wall
green painted wooden wall paneling along the lower walls
window with multiple glass panes showing exterior light

segments.scene_description: The player circles around the table, passing the burning fireplace which casts flickering orange light across the room. The camera reveals a wooden staircase leading upward and a worn sofa against the wall. The pan continues to show green wainscoting and a glass-paneled window, completing a survey of the cabin's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a rustic cabin into a detailed interior that shifts from dim shadows to warm, flickering light. It begins by crossing the threshold into a dimly lit dining area, moving toward a kitchen in the background where bright morning sunlight streams through a window. As the camera advances deeper into the room, the focus shifts to a deceased figure slumped over a dining table scattered with money, while a stone fireplace with an active fire emerges to the right. The scene then expands as the camera circles the table and the burning hearth, allowing the flickering orange glow to illuminate a worn sofa and a wooden staircase. Finally, the movement pans across green wainscoting and a glass-paneled window to complete the survey of the cabin's interior.
